category-def.name: intelligence
category-def.label: SMART Intelligence Plug-in
category-def.description: SMART Intelligence Plug-in contains an intelligence module that allows to organize, maintain and query intelligence information.

category-def.name: planning
category-def.label: SMART Planning Plug-in
category-def.description: SMART Planning Plug-in contains a plan module that allows to organize, maintain and query planning information.

category-def.name: independentincident
category-def.label: SMART Independent Incident Plug-in
category-def.description: SMART Independent Incident Plug-in provides the ability to record observations against the data model that are not associated with a patrol (or any other object).

category-def.name: entity
category-def.label: SMART Entity Tracking Plug-in
category-def.description: The entity tracking plugin provides the ability to track individual entities (animals or fixed), their attributes, and record observations associated with the entities.

category-def.name: ecologicalrecords
category-def.label: SMART Ecological Records Plug-in
category-def.description: The ecological records plugin provides the ability to create, manage and query surveys.
